name: igenius-memory
description: Persistent AI memory for your coding agents. Browse, search, promote, and manage short-term and long-term memories right from VS Code.

commands.title: iGenius: Visual Report — Analyze a URL
iGenius: Visual Screenshot — Capture a URL

igenius.apiKey.description: Your iGenius Memory API key (starts with ig_). Get one free at https://igenius-memory.store

igenius.autoRefreshInterval.description: Auto-refresh interval in seconds for the memory sidebar

igenius.showStatusBar.description: Show memory count in the status bar

enumDescriptions: LM Studio — Run open-source models locally or connect to a remote LM Studio instance
OpenAI — GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, and other OpenAI models (cloud)
Anthropic — Claude Sonnet, Opus, and Haiku models (cloud)
Google — Gemini 2.0 Flash, Pro, and other Google AI models (cloud)
igenius.ai.provider.markdownDescription:
Which AI provider powers memory classification, briefing generation, and extraction.

- **LM Studio** — Free, private, runs on your own hardware (local GPU or remote server)
- **OpenAI / Anthropic / Google** — Cloud providers requiring an API key

igenius.ai.lmstudio.baseUrl.markdownDescription:
LM Studio API endpoint.

- **Local:** `http://localhost:1234/v1` (default)
- **Remote:** Your server's URL, e.g. `http://your-server:1234/v1`

igenius.ai.lmstudio.model.description: Model identifier in LM Studio (e.g. qwen/qwen3.5-9b, deepseek-r1)

igenius.ai.openai.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your [OpenAI API key](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys). Required when provider is set to `openai`.

igenius.ai.openai.model.description: OpenAI model to use for memory processing

igenius.ai.anthropic.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your [Anthropic API key](https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys). Required when provider is set to `anthropic`.

enumDescriptions: Claude Sonnet 4 — Best balance of speed and intelligence
Claude Opus 4 — Most capable, highest quality
Claude Haiku 3 — Fastest and most affordable
Claude 3.5 Sonnet — Previous generation, still excellent
igenius.ai.anthropic.model.description: Anthropic model to use for memory processing

igenius.ai.google.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your [Google AI API key](https://aistudio.google.com/apikey). Required when provider is set to `google`.

enumDescriptions: Gemini 2.0 Flash — Fast, versatile workhorse model
Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite — Cost-efficient for high-volume tasks
Gemini 2.5 Pro — Most capable Google model (preview)
Gemini 2.5 Flash — Balanced speed and quality (preview)
igenius.ai.google.model.description: Google AI model to use for memory processing

igenius.pro.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable **Pro Continuous Readiness** engine — keeps your briefing pre-cached for instant delivery after context summarization

igenius.pro.warmIntervalSec.description: How often (seconds) the Pro engine refreshes the briefing cache

igenius.pro.consolidateThreshold.description: Auto-consolidate memories after this many ingests

igenius.pro.autoVisualUrl.markdownDescription:
URL to auto-analyze with iGenius Visual when the Pro engine runs. Leave empty to disable.

Example: `http://localhost:3000` for a local dev server.

igenius.pro.autoVisualIntervalMin.description: How often (minutes) to auto-run visual analysis on the configured URL. Requires Pro enabled + autoVisualUrl set.
